dj_text: Mmm. SUSPEKT - S.U.S.P.E.K.T.. Now Der Sort i Mine Øjne. Just two left. The queue is almost spent.
commercial_text: Welcome to Quiet FM from the Null Kosmos. Shhhh. This is the quiet dimension. No talking. No music. Just...
hijack_text: You're listening to Smooth Jazz FM from Dimension K-7. Mmm.
recovery_text: Someone is LEAKING our frequency to other kosmos. I have suspects. It's all of you.
title: Der Sort i Mine Øjne
